user_role_current_uidx.name: user_role_current_uidx
user_role_current_uidx.where: valid_to IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

information_barrier_active_idx.name: information_barrier_active_idx
information_barrier_active_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND lifted_at IS NULL

information_barrier_scope_check.name: information_barrier_scope_check
information_barrier_scope_check.value: "information_barrier"."deal_id" IS NOT NULL OR "information_barrier"."party_id" IS NOT NULL

address_principal_check.name: address_principal_check
address_principal_check.value: "address"."party_id" IS NOT NULL OR "address"."contact_id" IS NOT NULL

contact_email_uidx.name: contact_email_uidx
contact_email_uidx.where: primary_email IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

contact_pan_uidx.name: contact_pan_uidx
contact_pan_uidx.where: pan IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

party_contact_primary_uidx.name: party_contact_primary_uidx
party_contact_primary_uidx.where: is_primary AND valid_to IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

party_contact_current_idx.name: party_contact_current_idx
party_contact_current_idx.where: valid_to IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

deal_deal_code_uidx.name: deal_deal_code_uidx
deal_deal_code_uidx.where: deal_code IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

instrument_isin_uidx.name: instrument_isin_uidx
instrument_isin_uidx.where: isin IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

credit_analysis_current_idx.name: credit_analysis_current_idx
credit_analysis_current_idx.where: valid_to IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

credit_limit_current_idx.name: credit_limit_current_idx
credit_limit_current_idx.where: effective_to IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

consent_record_active_idx.name: consent_record_active_idx
consent_record_active_idx.where: consent_withdrawn_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

dsr_principal_check.name: dsr_principal_check
dsr_principal_check.value: "data_subject_request"."party_id" IS NOT NULL OR "data_subject_request"."contact_id" IS NOT NULL

task_open_idx.name: task_open_idx
task_open_idx.where: status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled') AND deleted_at IS NULL
